title: Audit F — Storage

findings.message: 1 documents have neither storageKey nor storageUrl. Investigate; rekey-skip on Phase 3.
1 documents reference a legacy local /uploads path (sample: /uploads/documents/legacy.pdf).
50 documents stored as public-readable Spaces URLs (no signature). Will be rekeyed to tenants/<tenantId>/... in Phase 3.

notes: Phase 1 does NOT migrate any object. The audit just sizes the Phase 3 rekey + ACL flip job.
Per ADR-006, frontend cutover precedes ACL flip.
